entry_market_snapshot.entry_note: User locked Over 185.5 at +113 after live odds moved from +128 while attempting to place. Micro sizing preserved risk control.

game_flow_summary.summary: The entry required a high-output fourth quarter in a close game. The close-game condition held, but scoring slowed enough in Q4 to leave the total short by 9.5 points.

MIN.N_Howard: 26 pts, 5 reb, 4 ast, 3 blk on 11-14 FG. Elite efficiency supported over path but 7 turnovers added empty possessions.
MIN.C_Williams: 21 pts on 9-10 FG and 3-4 3PT. Extremely efficient scoring, but low FT volume limited late extension.
MIN.N_Coffey: 13 pts, 8 reb on perfect 3-3 from deep. Hot perimeter support confirmed.
MIN.O_Miles: 15 pts, 6 ast. Creation supported game flow.

DAL.P_Bueckers: 27 pts, 8 ast, 3-4 3PT, 10-11 FT. Primary Dallas engine and over support.
DAL.M_Siegrist: 17 bench points on 7-11 FG. Bench scoring spike helped position stay alive.
DAL.A_Ogunbowale: 6 pts on 2-11 FG. Major scoring drag and one of the reasons the over failed.
DAL.J_Shepard: 7 pts, 6 reb, 4 ast. Low scoring from starter frontcourt limited ceiling.

postmortem_phases.phase_1_game_flow: The game entered the late third quarter at a strong scoring pace and remained close, validating the initial over entry logic. However, the fourth quarter produced only 38 points versus the 48 needed from end of Q3.
phase_2_pivotal_moments: Entry was made at 135 total points with roughly 11 minutes left, requiring 51+ more points.
End of 3Q total reached 138, requiring 48 Q4 points.
Close-game condition held, but whistle/foul extension did not deliver enough points.
Dallas perimeter support outside Paige and Siegrist lagged, especially Ogunbowale finishing 2-11.
Minnesota shot 60.3% overall, but turnover count and lower late FT conversion volume prevented total from reaching 186.

phase_4_model_relevance_summary.model_alignment: Entry logic was reasonable for a micro plus-money total, but the threshold required too much fourth-quarter scoring. Future over entries above 185 late in Q3 should demand either stronger live foul indicators or a lower needed Q4 threshold.
future_adjustments: Add LATE_HIGH_TOTAL_OVER_FILTER when needed Q4 points exceed 46
Require active bonus/FT acceleration for late overs above 185
Downgrade overs when one high-usage scorer is below 35% FG and team 3PT depth is weak
Preserve micro-only sizing for plus-money late total entries
